title: VFX-01: Color Grading & LUT Creation
body:
**ID:** VFX-01

### Goal
Achieve the cinematic, fiery look of the Sun (reference) through filmic color correction.

### Workflow
- Analyze reference palette (dominant hues, saturation, contrast).
- Build 3D LUT for ACES-like tonemapping/final grading.
- Tune exposure/contrast to preserve highlight detail in emissive areas.

### Deliverables
- `Assets/LUT/sun_lut.cube` (size: 16×16×16 or 32×32×32).
- Before/after preview PNGs.
- Integration notes: suggested exposure/gamma/threshold values for the PostFX pass.

### Acceptance
- Visual match within tolerance to reference; no clipping/banding.
- Developer can plug the `.cube` into PostFX and see identical result.

### Checklist
- [ ] Palette analysis doc
- [ ] LUT exported
- [ ] Integration notes written

title: VFX-02: Noise & Flow Maps for Surface
body:
**ID:** VFX-02

### Goal
Provide procedural textures for solar granulation and boiling motion via UV advection.

### Workflow
- Author seamless 3D noise (Perlin/Worley/FBM).
- Prepare 2D flow map for advection (RG = xy velocity).
- Two frequency bands: Low-frequency (large convection cells) and High-frequency (fine turbulence).

### Deliverables
- `Assets/Noise/noise_low_3d.exr` (128³ or 256³)
- `Assets/Noise/noise_high_3d.exr` (128³ or 256³)
- `Assets/Flow/flow_map.png` (RGBA 512²; RG = velocity; BA reserved)
- Parameter sheet: `granulationScale`, `flowSpeed`, `mixLowHigh`

### Acceptance
- Tiling/seamless; no visible repetition at typical FOVs.
- Developer can animate scrolling/advection smoothly at 60 FPS (High preset).

### Checklist
- [ ] 3D noises exported
- [ ] Flow map authored
- [ ] Param sheet attached

title: VFX-03: Sunspot & Penumbra Masks
body:
**ID:** VFX-03

### Goal
Break surface uniformity with believable sunspots (umbra/penumbra) varying in size and density.

### Workflow
- Generate grayscale mask with soft falloff.
- Ensure tileable pattern with randomizable offsets.
- Provide density/threshold recommendations.

### Deliverables
- `Assets/Masks/sunspot_mask_1024.png` (tileable)
- Notes: `spotThreshold`, `spotDensity`, recommended contrast curve

### Acceptance
- Spots integrate naturally under emissive grading; no harsh edges.

### Checklist
- [ ] Mask exported
- [ ] Notes included

title: VFX-04: Prominence / Flare Flipbooks (Cinematic)
body:
**ID:** VFX-04

### Goal
Animated solar prominences placed along the limb for cinematic mode.

### Workflow
- Paint/simulate wispy plasma shapes.
- Export flipbook atlas with alpha, 8–16 frames.
- Balance emissive intensity vs bloom.

### Deliverables
- `Assets/Flipbooks/prominence_flipbook.png` (e.g., 512×8192, 16 frames)
- Timing guide: 12–15 FPS
- UV indexing notes for shader

### Acceptance
- Looping without popping; matches corona color.

### Checklist
- [ ] Atlas exported
- [ ] Timing guide attached
- [ ] UV notes documented

title: VFX-05: Lens Dirt & Bloom Mask
body:
**ID:** VFX-05

### Goal
Subtle lens imperfections visible only in strong bloom regions.

### Workflow
- Create a high-res dirt texture simulating camera lens dust/smudges.
- Calibrate intensity for 0.1–0.2 opacity range.

### Deliverables
- `Assets/PostFX/lens_dirt_1024.png` (grayscale)
- Blend mode recommendation (multiply in bloom pass)
- Preview before/after PNGs

### Acceptance
- Adds realism without distracting patterns.

### Checklist
- [ ] Dirt map exported
- [ ] Blend/opacity notes
- [ ] Previews attached

title: VFX-06: Corona / Rim Glow Textures
body:
**ID:** VFX-06

### Goal
Textures to boost corona billboards/raymarch with gradients and directional noise.

### Workflow
- Author radial gradient textures for emissive rim.
- Provide tileable directional noise for dynamic flickering.

### Deliverables
- `Assets/Corona/corona_gradient_1024.png`
- `Assets/Corona/corona_noise_512.png`
- Suggested shader params: `coronaIntensity`, `coronaScale`, `flickerSpeed`

### Acceptance
- No banding at 16F pipeline; consistent rim behavior.

### Checklist
- [ ] Gradient ready
- [ ] Noise ready
- [ ] Params documented

title: VFX-07: VFX Documentation & Visual Targets
body:
**ID:** VFX-07

### Goal
Single source of truth for developers integrating assets.

### Workflow
- Collect previews of each texture (thumbnail PNGs).
- Document parameter ranges, blend modes, shader integration.
- Provide mockups for final composite.

### Deliverables
- `Docs/VFX_Documentation.pdf`
- `Docs/preview_gallery/*` (raw vs expected)
- Master parameter table (CSV/MD)

### Acceptance
- Dev can integrate assets without sync meetings.

### Checklist
- [ ] PDF complete
- [ ] Gallery exported
- [ ] Param table added

title: REN-01: Photosphere Shader (Surface Layer)
body:
**ID:** REN-01

### Goal
Granulating emissive surface with limb darkening and sunspots.

### Workflow
- Sphere mesh render.
- Limb darkening: `I(μ)=I0*(a+bμ+cμ²)`.
- FBM granulation mixed low/high noise; UV advection via flow map.
- Sunspot mask with soft penumbra.

### Deliverables
- `Shaders/Photosphere.metal` (VS+PS)
- Params: `granulationScale`, `flowSpeed`, `limbCoeffs`, `spotThreshold`
- Test scene screenshot (animated)

### Acceptance
- Stable animation; no banding (RGBA16F). Target cost <0.5ms.

### Checklist
- [ ] Shader compiled
- [ ] Params exposed
- [ ] Perf measured

title: REN-02: Chromosphere Shell (Thin Rim)
body:
**ID:** REN-02

### Goal
Thin emissive shell enhancing limb glow.

### Workflow
- Offset sphere (R+ε) with rim function by view angle.
- Noise-based flicker modulation.

### Deliverables
- `Shaders/Chromosphere.metal`
- Params: `rimIntensity`, `rimFalloff`, `flickerSpeed`
- Visibility test near limb

### Acceptance
- Clean rim without halo artifacts.

### Checklist
- [ ] Shader compiled
- [ ] Rim tuned
- [ ] Flicker validated

title: REN-03: Corona — Billboards (Default)
body:
**ID:** REN-03

### Goal
Lightweight corona using depth-sorted billboards/shells.

### Workflow
- 4–6 translucent shells; flow noise distortion.
- Additive blending; correct sort order.

### Deliverables
- `Shaders/CoronaBillboard.metal`
- Params: `coronaIntensity`, `coronaScale`
- Perf: <1.2ms/frame; screenshot

### Acceptance
- No z-fighting; smooth parallax with camera.

### Checklist
- [ ] Shader compiled
- [ ] Sorting verified
- [ ] Perf logged

title: REN-04: Corona — Raymarching (Cinematic)
body:
**ID:** REN-04

### Goal
High-quality volumetric corona with thin-shell raymarch.

### Workflow
- 8–24 steps; temporal jitter + blue-noise dither.
- Early exit; adjustable step count via presets.

### Deliverables
- `Shaders/CoronaRaymarch.metal`
- Quality presets: Low/Med/High
- Visual tests: no banding/flicker

### Acceptance
- ≥24 FPS in Cinematic Near; stable glow.

### Checklist
- [ ] Raymarch implemented
- [ ] Dither/jitter added
- [ ] Presets wired

title: REN-05: Prominences Particles (GPU)
body:
**ID:** REN-05

### Goal
Compute-driven particles following magnetic arcs along the limb.

### Workflow
- Compute update (curl-noise/arc paths).
- Additive render; life/size over time.

### Deliverables
- `Shaders/Prominences.compute.metal`
- `Shaders/Prominences.render.metal`
- Params: `particleCount`, `arcHeight`, `lifetime`
- Demo: 10–20k particles <1.0ms

### Acceptance
- No stalls; consistent emission at limb.

### Checklist
- [ ] Compute pass OK
- [ ] Render pass OK
- [ ] Perf OK

title: REN-06: Post-Processing (Bloom, ACES, Vignette, Lens Dirt)
body:
**ID:** REN-06

### Goal
Cinematic compositing for emissive source.

### Workflow
- HDR bloom (threshold, mip chain).
- ACES tonemap.
- Optional lens dirt multiply in bloom.
- Subtle vignette.

### Deliverables
- `Shaders/PostFX.metal`
- Params: `bloomThreshold`, `bloomRadius`, `lensDirtOpacity`
- Before/after screenshots

### Acceptance
- No color clipping; smooth highlights.

### Checklist
- [ ] Bloom OK
- [ ] Tonemap OK
- [ ] Lens dirt optional

title: REN-07: Quality Presets & LOD Manager
body:
**ID:** REN-07

### Goal
Runtime scaling: Low/Med/High/Cinematic.

### Workflow
- Centralize params: ray steps, particle count, corona mode.
- Hot-switch without pipeline rebuild.

### Deliverables
- `Engine/QualityManager.swift`
- Preset config (JSON/enum)
- Demo video switching presets without hitch (>50ms forbidden)

### Acceptance
- Stable frame time during switches.

### Checklist
- [ ] Presets defined
- [ ] API exposed
- [ ] Hitch tested

title: APP-01: Gesture Controls (Orbit/Zoom/Pan)
body:
**ID:** APP-01

### Goal
Natural camera interaction around the Sun.

### Workflow
- Pinch = zoom, Pan = orbit, Rotate = roll (optional).
- Inertia/smoothing; clamp distances.

### Deliverables
- `App/CameraController.swift`
- Tunable params: `orbitSpeed`, `zoomSpeed`, `min/maxDistance`
- Screen recording demo

### Acceptance
- No gimbal lock; smooth interaction at 60 FPS.

### Checklist
- [ ] Gestures wired
- [ ] Inertia tuned
- [ ] Demo recorded

title: APP-02: Debug / Developer Panel (SwiftUI)
body:
**ID:** APP-02

### Goal
Runtime control of VFX/Render params and presets.

### Workflow
- SwiftUI panel with sliders/toggles.
- Bind to QualityManager + shader uniforms.

### Deliverables
- `App/DebugPanelView.swift`
- Parameter list with ranges (MD)
- Video toggling presets live

### Acceptance
- Changes apply without frame spikes.

### Checklist
- [ ] UI built
- [ ] Bindings complete
- [ ] Video attached

title: APP-03: Scene Integration (MetalView + SunRenderer)
body:
**ID:** APP-03

### Goal
Integrate the Sun renderer into the app’s Solar System scene.

### Workflow
- MetalView wrapper for SwiftUI.
- Initialize pipelines; hook to presets.
- Sync transforms, scale, exposure.

### Deliverables
- `Rendering/SunRenderer.swift`
- Working screen in app with Sun visible
- Notes for integration with existing scene graph

### Acceptance
- Renders alongside existing objects; no Z/order issues.

### Checklist
- [ ] MetalView integrated
- [ ] Renderer init OK
- [ ] Scene verified

title: APP-04: Telemetry & Profiling Overlay
body:
**ID:** APP-04

### Goal
Expose FPS and per-pass timings for profiling.

### Workflow
- Collect frame time, GPU pass timings, particle counts.
- On-screen overlay + CSV export (optional).

### Deliverables
- `App/Telemetry.swift`
- Overlay toggle (debug)
- Example CSV/console log

### Acceptance
- Metrics stable and match Xcode GPU report trends.

### Checklist
- [ ] Overlay added
- [ ] CSV/log export
- [ ] Cross-checked with Instruments
